name: 06-10-frontend-fluidity-optimization
title: Frontend Fluidity Optimization
description: Tighten confirmed frontend fluidity issues without changing product behavior.
scope: map rendering and shared UI performance
creator: codex
notes: Added responsive map height variables, AMap DNS prefetch, touch scroll stabilization, reduced-motion guard, and scoped hover/focus will-change hints. product/App.jsx was already dirty and was not edited.
